candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line at the top of the income statement; valid top-line revenue label.
Also a top-line revenue/sales label and numerically identical to Total Revenue in the preview; useful as alternate label across years.
Operating income, not top-line revenue.
Operating expense subtotal, not revenue.
Finance income, not revenue from operations.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, not a sum. Both are explicit top-line revenue rows.

candidates.why: Direct and explicit COGS label.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same COGS concept; useful as alternate label across years/data loads.
Component of production cost, but less complete than the explicit total COGS row.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should be avoided when explicit COGS exists.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. Selected explicit COGS labels; excluded component and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A label exists, but appears mostly empty in preview; per rule include it and add overhead buckets for coverage.
Separate R&D expense above EBIT; include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear selling overhead component above EBIT.
Clear administrative overhead component above EBIT.
Closest additional overhead bucket; exclude FX-specific subrow and losses as separate non-recurring details.
Overhead component, but only shown in early year and likely already embedded within broader buckets later.
Overhead-like component, but only shown in early year and likely embedded within broader buckets later.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus populated overhead buckets per rule. Added Development expenditure because it is a separate R&D line above EBIT and not clearly embedded in the selected SG&A buckets.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D-related expense line above EBIT; best match for research and development expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization, but this is amortization/supplemental and not the preferred operating R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. Same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so XSGA-XRD nets out R&D.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance-cost line; broader than pure interest but preferred over incomplete component selection.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but appears to be only part of total finance costs.
Finance-cost component, but incomplete on its own.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/detail, not preferred over primary statement line.
EBIT, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the primary finance-expense line because the underlying component rows appear incomplete and selecting only them would likely understate recurring financing cost. Avoided combining total with components to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Direct equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Equivalent total equity line; useful alternate label across years/data loads.
Balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent-equity line is present, so using total equity as BE priority labels. MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is present on the provided balance sheet.
